apm.label: APM / Entry PM
apm.bar: Clear structure, user curiosity, basic metrics, coachability.

pm.label: PM / IC4
pm.bar: Independent judgment, clean trade-offs, practical execution.

senior.label: Senior PM / IC5
senior.bar: Ambiguity handling, stakeholder influence, metrics depth.

staff.label: Staff / Group PM
staff.bar: Org-level trade-offs, durable strategy, executive communication.

ai-pm.label: AI PM
ai-pm.bar: PM fundamentals plus evals, model limits, trust, privacy, cost, and fallback design.

pm-t.label: PM-T
pm-t.bar: Product judgment plus APIs, data flow, reliability, and engineering trade-offs.
